overall.description: Gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city under elevated highways, then transitioning to driving through dense traffic. The environment features towering brutalist buildings, massive digital billboards, palm trees, and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway sidewalk with commercial storefronts

events.description: character in gold jacket exits frame to the right, camera continues forward

agents.ego_description: following a character in a gold jacket along the sidewalk under an elevated highway, then continuing past various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character in gold jacket and red pants walking ahead of camera before exiting right

entered.detail: tall building with green horizontal stripes and red signage at street level
massive concrete overpass with yellow accent lighting spanning the street above
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk in planters

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a green commercial building and elevated highway structure. The camera follows a character in a gold jacket walking along a concrete sidewalk under the overpass. Around 6 seconds, the gold jacket character exits the frame, and the camera continues forward past other pedestrians and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with parked vehicles and digital signage

events.description: passing by parked futuristic sports cars including a lime green vehicle
approaching intersection with crosswalk and traffic lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing various pedestrians and parked futuristic vehicles while approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple outfit walking in same direction ahead of camera
pedestrian in red jacket walking opposite direction

entered.detail: multi-level white concrete parking structure with open levels visible
glowing advertisement screen mounted on building facade
raised concrete planters with spiky vegetation along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk with concrete support pillars and large digital billboards. The camera passes parked futuristic vehicles including a lime green sports car. Pedestrians in various outfits walk in mixed directions. The green commercial building from the previous segment falls behind as the camera approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with active traffic

events.description: stepping off sidewalk onto striped crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
perspective switches from third-person walking to first-person vehicle driving

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk with a group of pedestrians then transitioning to driving a vehicle

notable_agents.action: red compact car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross
pedestrian in green jacket crossing the street alongside ego

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
tall pole with traffic signals and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a wide urban intersection on striped crosswalk markings, moving from the sheltered sidewalk into open space. Pedestrians cross alongside while a red compact car waits. Midway through, the perspective abruptly shifts to a driving view, indicating the character has entered a vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with overhead digital billboards

events.description: now driving in dense traffic among various futuristic vehicles
weaving through traffic passing a silver van and teal sports car

agents.ego_description: driving through city traffic at moderate speed, weaving between futuristic cars and trucks

notable_agents.action: silver delivery van driving in the left lane ahead
sleek teal sports car with illuminated accents driving in right lane

entered.detail: massive suspended digital screens spanning across the street displaying colorful advertisements
dark colored truck with illuminated front grille and modern design

segments.scene_description: Driving through a canyon of tall buildings with massive overhead digital billboards spanning the road. The camera weaves through dense futuristic traffic including a silver van, teal sports car, and various sedans. The perspective is from vehicle height, showing the road ahead and surrounding cars in the multi-lane street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a pedestrian stroll beneath urban overpasses into a high-speed drive through a dense futuristic city center. It begins by following a character in a gold jacket along a concrete sidewalk under an elevated highway, moving past palm trees and pedestrians as the character exits the frame. The camera then glides further along the covered walkway, passing concrete support pillars, large digital billboards, and parked futuristic vehicles including a lime green sports car. As the scene opens up, the camera crosses a wide urban intersection on striped markings before the perspective abruptly shifts to a vehicle's point of view. Finally, the camera weaves through a canyon of towering buildings and multi-lane traffic, passing silver and teal cars beneath massive overhead digital billboards.
